name: Orgone decorations
description:
Warning:
Courier/post deliveries for orgone, dowsing pendulums etc. are free of charge for Germany and Austria. 
Deliveries only to EU countries !!! For orders over 150€ for orgone decorations/radionic devices delivery is also free of charge.
Please note: only digital products / attunments and online courses are available in all EU and non-EU countries.
